calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. MATTER SETTLED, AS SET FORTH IN THE STIP FOR JUDGMENT LODGED WITH THE COURT THIS DATE. PLTFS TO RECOVER FROM DEFTS PREMISES LOCATED AT 99 REARDON ROAD, #322, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. EXECUTION OF THIS JUDGEMENT FOR POSSESSION OF SAID PREMISES SHALL BE STAYED AS LONG AS:DEFTS PAY TO PLTF $900.00 PARTIAL PAYMENT OF RENTS AND PER DIEM DAMAGES DUE ON THE PREMISES THROUGH SEPT. 30, 2004,AND $400.00 ON OR BEFORE OCT. 15, 2004. DEFTS ARE ALSO TO PAY$1960.00 AS DEFTS FINAL PAYMENT OF RENTS AND PER DIEM DAMAGES DUE ONT HE PREMISES THROUGH SEPT. 30, 2004. AND, $1000.00 FOR ATTY FEES AND COSTS. THIS MONEY SHALL BE PAID TO PLTF IN MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $175.00 PER MONTH UNTIL THE BALANCE OF $2960. IS PAID IN FULL. EFF. OCT. 1, 2004, DEFTS ARE TO PAY THEIR RENT OF $815.00 PER MONTH, ETC.IF PARTIES ARE MORE THAN FIVE DAYS LATE ON ANY OF THE ABOVE PAYMENTS, PLTF SHALL MAKE EX PARTE APPLICATION OF THE COURT TO OBTAIN RELEASE FROM STAY, AND WILL RECIEVE JUDGEMENT FOR ALL BACK RENTS, RESTITUTION OF PREMISES, AND ATTY FEES OF $500.00 TO THE PLTF.ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT IN THE BUILDING, WILL BECOME PROPERTY OF PLTF TO DISPOSE OF AS PLTF SEES FIT. IF DEFTS COMPLETE TIMELY PAYMENTS OF ALL RENTS AND PER DIEM DAMAGES AND ATTY FEES, PLTF SHALL FILE A DISMISSAL OF THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.TRIAL DATE VACATED.PLTF'S CSL:MICHAEL ROSSOFF,ESQ.;DEFT CSL:CHARLES COLLINS,ESQ.;JUDGE PRO TEM:ZADIK SHAPIRO;CLERK-BBSURRATT;NOT REPORTED.(DEPT. 218)

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
